breakdown: Naming: 78 - Test function names are descriptive (test_process_action_stream_infers_failure_without_explicit_success), but some variables like 'harness' and 'commands' are generic. Error Handling: 80 - Tests properly assert error conditions (response['error'], status_code 500). Type Safety: 70 - Basic type hints present (list[list[str]], set[str]) but uses dynamic type creation via type() constructor. Architecture: 80 - Tests integrated into existing test modules; proper mock patterns. Test Coverage: 80 - New tests cover multiple scenarios (failure handling, bootstrap fallback, runtime deps). Documentation: 65 - No docstrings on test functions or comments explaining test scenarios; no inline WHY comments.
key_changes: Add test for process_action_stream failure handling with error status
Add tests for runtime bootstrap numpy downgrade skipping
Add test for runtime bootstrap cache invalidation with timeouts
Add test for runtime bootstrap fallback package candidates
Add test for evidence_signature_guard external server skip
Add test_loc_script.py for loc.sh script with spaces and test detection
